metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for security analysis and vulnerability scanning

plugins.name: vuln-scan
plugins.description: Autonomous vulnerability scanning pipeline for code repositories. Runs an 8-phase pipeline: recon, threat model, static analysis, LLM code review, dependency scan, secret detection, validation, and reporting.

plugins.name: pentest-core
plugins.description: Core infrastructure for offensive security engagements. Manages engagement configuration, scope validation, remote execution, evidence organization, and Plextrac-compatible finding export.

plugins.name: pentest-recon
plugins.description: Passive and active reconnaissance skills for penetration testing engagements. Subdomain enumeration, port scanning, service fingerprinting, OSINT, and attack surface discovery.

plugins.name: pentest-enum
plugins.description: Enumeration skills for penetration testing engagements. Web application, network service, and cloud infrastructure enumeration.

plugins.name: pentest-analysis
plugins.description: Target prioritization and attack surface analysis for penetration testing engagements. Synthesizes recon, enumeration, and scanning data to recommend high-value targets.

plugins.name: pentest-scanning
plugins.description: Vulnerability scanning and custom template generation for penetration testing engagements. Nuclei-based scanning with tech-stack-aware template selection and custom template creation.

plugins.name: pentest-exploit
plugins.description: Exploitation guidance and credential attack skills for penetration testing engagements. Expert-assisted exploit selection, payload generation, and password spraying/cracking.

plugins.name: pentest-postexploit
plugins.description: Active Directory attack chains and post-exploitation skills for penetration testing engagements. AD exploitation, privilege escalation, lateral movement, loot collection, and detection rule generation.

plugins.name: pentest-evasion
plugins.description: Defense evasion techniques for red team engagements. Payload obfuscation, AMSI/ETW bypass, LOLBins, process injection, C2 communications, and covering tracks. Entire plugin is RoE-gated.

plugins.name: pentest-social
plugins.description: Social engineering skills for penetration testing engagements. Phishing campaign setup, email template generation, infrastructure configuration, and results parsing. RoE-gated.

plugins.name: pentest-utility
plugins.description: Utility skills for penetration testing engagements. Finding report writing, engagement cleanup checklist generation, and remediation retesting.

plugins.name: pentest-methodology-guard
plugins.description: Hooks that enforce the pentest-* skill methodology during penetration testing engagements. Injects a methodology baseline at session start, a detailed phase-to-skill mapping when the user submits a pentest-related prompt, and a warn-level reminder when a known pentest tool binary is invoked via raw Bash without using the matching skill.

plugins.name: tmux-notify
plugins.description: Renames the active tmux window to a visible marker (⚠ CLAUDE) when Claude Code is waiting on user input, and restores the original name once you respond.

plugins.name: dangerous-bash-guard
plugins.description: PreToolUse Bash hook that hard-blocks irreversible/system-destructive commands and prompts on history-rewriting + shared-state side-effects (git force-push, kubectl delete, terraform apply, gh pr merge, etc.). Designed to pair with bypassPermissions mode. Escape hatch: prefix with CLAUDE_ALLOW_DANGEROUS=1 (audit-logged).
